title: Do I Need a Fractional CMO or an Agency? | Daniel Fox
meta_description: Agencies execute inside your current answers about the customer. A fractional CMO reopens those answers. If your answers are producing your ceiling, execution isn't the constraint. Daniel Fox.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a fractional CMO or an agency?

acceptedAnswer.text: Agencies execute inside the answers you already hold about who your customer is and what they value. A fractional CMO reopens those answers. If your current answers are producing your current ceiling, execution is not the constraint and another agency will reach the same ceiling faster. Choose the agency when the strategy is right and the doing is the gap. Choose a fractional CMO when the number has stopped responding to more and better effort. Daniel Fox is a fractional B2C CMO who reopens the answers.

@graph.headline: Do I need a fractional CMO or an agency?
@graph.description: Agencies execute inside your current answers. A fractional CMO reopens them. How to tell which you need.
